hero.title: Engineering PulseOps
hero.subtitle: Realtime infrastructure observability powered by event-driven architecture and WebSocket synchronization.

intro.title: What is PulseOps?
intro.description: PulseOps is a production-grade observability platform designed to provide instant visibility into distributed infrastructure. By leveraging a high-performance event-driven architecture, it ensures that operational changes are reflected across all clients in milliseconds.
intro.goal_desc: Traditional monitoring often relies on manual refreshes or long-polling, leading to 'stale' insights. PulseOps solves this by establishing a persistent bidirectional communication layer between the engine and the dashboard.

architecture.title: System Architecture
architecture.description: A modern full-stack implementation focused on scalability and realtime data integrity.
architecture.flow_desc: PulseOps uses a 'Scheduler-to-Client' flow where the monitoring engine orchestrates checks and immediately broadcasts results via Socket.io.

flow.title: Monitoring Lifecycle
flow.step5_desc: Events emitted via NestJS Event Emitter to Gateway.
flow.step6_desc: React Query cache invalidation across all tabs.

logic.title: Classification Logic
logic.description: Monitoring intelligence that understands context beyond simple up/down states.
logic.prot_desc: 401/403 - Auth required but service is reachable.

stack.title: Technology Stack
stack.description: Thoughtful engineering decisions for a scalable observability platform.
stack.nextjs: Frontend framework with React Query for robust state management.
stack.nestjs: Enterprise Node.js framework for scalable monitoring services.
stack.prisma: Type-safe ORM for reliable database interactions.

principles.title: Engineering Principles
principles.p1_desc: Every state change must be broadcasted instantly.
principles.p2_desc: Decoupled architecture using internal event emitters.
principles.p3_desc: Optimistic updates and robust error handling.

dashboard.title: Infrastructure Overview
dashboard.subtitle: Real-time health telemetry across all connected clusters and edge endpoints.

security.title: Security Overview
security.subtitle: Advanced security scanning and vulnerability detection metrics are being processed.
security.telemetry_hint: Real-time firewall telemetry will appear here shortly.

services.title: Services Management
services.subtitle: Real-time status overview of your global infrastructure and microservices.
services.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this service? This action cannot be undone and monitoring will stop immediately.

messages.system_status_ok: All monitored services are functioning within normal parameters.
